title: Add architecture decision records
original_text: Added architecture decision records (ADRs) for major technical decisions. Created ADR template for consistency. Documented decision to use microservices architecture. Documented decision to use event-driven architecture. Documented database technology choices. Documented API design decisions. Added ADR index and review process. Result: 12 ADRs documented.
expected_body_lines: - Document database and API design decisions
- Add ADR index and review process
expected_command: git commit -m "docs(arch): add architecture decision records"
